2606.13024.title: CausalMoE: A Billion-Scale Multimodal Foundation Model for Granger Causal Discovery with Pattern-Routed Heterogeneous Experts
2606.13024.paper_summary: Granger Causal Discovery (GCD) is fundamental for analyzing temporal dependencies in complex systems. However, existing neural GCD methods predominantly rely on a "one-size-fits-all" paradigm, struggling to capture distribution shifts and dynamic regime changes inherent in real-world time series. This often leads to entangled representations and spurious causal graphs. In this paper, we propose CausalMoE, a billion-scale multimodal Granger causal foundation model that explicitly models patch-level heterogeneity. CausalMoE introduces a Pattern-Routed Mixture of Heterogeneous Experts, which dynamically identifies latent temporal patterns and routes patches to specialized domain experts, effectively decoupling regime-specific mechanisms from shared dynamics. To ensure interpretable graph recovery, we design a Causality-Aware Self-Attention mechanism operating across variables, yielding sparse Granger causal graphs via proximal optimization. Furthermore, CausalMoE is the first to integrate LLMs and VLMs to align numerical signals with textual and visual priors, regularizing causal estimation in complex scenarios. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CausalMoE establishes a new state-of-the-art on fully supervised benchmarks, while effectively generalizing to few-shot settings where traditional methods fail.
2606.13024.paper_summary_zh: Granger 因果發現 (GCD) 是分析複雜系統中時間依賴性的基礎。<lb/>然而，現有的神經 GCD 方法主要依賴於「一刀切」的範式，難以捕捉現實世界時間序列中固有的分佈轉變和動態體制變化。<lb/>這常常導致糾纏的表示和虛假的因果圖。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了 CausalMoE，一種以十億規模的多模態 Granger 因果基礎模型，明確建模補丁級別的異質性。<lb/>CausalMoE 引入了一種模式路由異質專家混合模型，動態識別潛在的時間模式並將補丁路由到專門的領域專家，有效地將特定體制的機制與共享動態解耦。<lb/>為了確保可解釋的圖恢復，我們設計了一種跨變量運作的因果感知自注意機制，通過近端優化產生稀疏的 Granger 因果圖。<lb/>此外，CausalMoE 是首個將 LLM 和 VLM 整合在一起，以對齊數值信號與文本和視覺先驗，在複雜情境中正則化因果估計的模型。<lb/>大量實驗表明，CausalMoE 在完全監督的基準上建立了新的最先進水平，同時在傳統方法失敗的少量樣本設置中有效地進行了泛化。
2606.13024.author: Bo Liu et.al.
2606.13024.authors: Bo Liu, Di Dai, Jingwei Liu, Jiarui Jin, Xiaocheng Fang, Guangkun Nie, Hongyan Li, Shenda Hong
